chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D – 1437 of 2021 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Priority 1. For order on office objection 2. For Hearing of Misc. No.6052/2011 3. For Hearing of Main Case 11.03.2021 Mr. Ayan Mustafa Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, DAG. --------------- On the last date of hearing, learned counsel for EOBI appeared and he was apprised of the fact that the counsel for the petitioner intend to file relevant documents / evidence for consideration of the Appellate Authority, Board of Trustee, Employees’ Old-Age Benefits Institution, as they were deprived of filing documents / evidence, and his request is only for the remand of the case to the authority concerned for reconsideration of the evidence, which they now intend to file. Today neither any comments have been filed nor the counsel for EOBI is in attendance though it is date by court case. Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, DAG, submits that since he appeared on the last date of hearing, therefore, no intimation was given to them by him. He understood to the contention of learned counsel for the petitioner and consider it reasonable and submits that for reaching to a lawful consideration, they may be given shortest possible time. We deem it appropriate to allow the petitioner to submit relevant documents / evidence that is in their possession for the consideration of Appellate Authority for reaching to a just and fair conclusion.

He understood to the contention of learned counsel for the petitioner and consider it reasonable and submits that for reaching to a lawful consideration, they may be given shortest possible time. We deem it appropriate to allow the petitioner to submit relevant documents / evidence that is in their possession for the consideration of Appellate Authority for reaching to a just and fair conclusion. They may file requisite documents within a week’s time and they may be heard and the decision be passed within two weeks’ time without any delay. With this observation, impugned decision dated 10.01.2021, which is incorrectly written as 10.01.2020, is set aside with directions to pass a speaking order in accordance with law. Judge Judge Riaz, p.s.
